source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The outside of a $2 \times 2 \times 2$ cube is painted with black and white squares in such a way that it appears as if it was built using alternate black cubes and white cubes, as shown. Which of the following is a net of the painted cube?
<image1>
<image2>

normalization_notes: Removed inline image placeholder tags from the question text as packaging noise.
Kept the label-only choice map because the actual option content is visual and should not be reconstructed from the image.
Marked as image-required because identifying the correct net depends on the cube diagram and the pictured answer choices.
